```{.r .cell-code .hidden} library(kableExtra, exclude = ("group_rows")) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden} ``` Warning: package 'kableExtra' was built under R version 4.4.3 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code .hidden} options(digits = 3) options(knitr.kable.NA = '') path_processed <- "\\\\research.drive.wisc.edu\\jjcurtin\\studydata\\cov\\data_processed" table <- read_csv(here::here(path_processed, "estimate_tibble.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code .hidden} footnote_methods <- "Screening models represent symbolic linear models where \\(Y\\) is the outcome, \\(X\\) is the focal independent variable, \\(C\\) is a covariate, and \\(k\\) is the number of covariates." lm_methods <- tibble( Method = c( "No covariates", "All covariates", "p-hacking", "Separate covariate linear model without X", "Separate covariate linear model with X", "Simultaneous covariate linear model without X", "Simultaneous covariate linear model with X", "Simultaneous covariate LASSO without X", "Simultaneous covariate LASSO with X" ), `Screening Models` = c( "No screening models", "No screening models", "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1}\\)
\\(Y \\sim X + C_{2}\\)
\\(\\vdots\\)
\\(Y \\sim X + C_{k}\\)", "\\(Y \\sim C_{1}\\)
\\(Y \\sim C_{2}\\)
\\(\\vdots\\)
\\(Y \\sim C_{k}\\)", "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1}\\)
\\(Y \\sim X + C_{2}\\)
\\(\\vdots\\)
\\(Y \\sim X + C_{k}\\)", "\\(Y \\sim C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\)", "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\)", "\\(Y \\sim C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\) with \\(\\lambda\\) penalty applied to all covariates", "\\(Y \\sim X + C_{1} + C_{2} + \\cdots + C_{k}\\) with \\(\\lambda\\) penalty applied to all covariates" ), `Covariate Selection Criteria` = c( "No covariates used", "All covariates used", "Covariates that lower the p-value of \\(X\\) are retained in the final model", "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) are retained in the final model", "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) when controlling for \\(X\\) are retained in the final model", "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) when controlling for all other covariates are retained in the final model", "Significant covariates (\\(p < .05\\)) when controlling for \\(X\\) and all other covariates are retained in the final model", "Covariates with non-zero coefficients are retained in the model", "Covariates with non-zero coefficients are retained in the model" ) ) ``` ::: ::: {#tbl-methods .cell tbl-cap='The nine linear regression models and their definition for covariate selection.'} ```{.r .cell-code .hidden} #| label: tbl-methods #| tbl-cap: The nine linear regression models and their definition for covariate selection. lm_methods |> kbl(escape = FALSE, format = "html") |> kable_classic() |> kableExtra::footnote(general = footnote_methods, escape=FALSE) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden} ``` Warning in attr(x, "align"): 'xfun::attr()' is deprecated. Use 'xfun::attr2()' instead. See help("Deprecated") ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Method Screening Models Covariate Selection Criteria
No covariates No screening models No covariates used
All covariates No screening models All covariates used
p-hacking \(Y \sim X + C_{1}\)
\(Y \sim X + C_{2}\)
\(\vdots\)
\(Y \sim X + C_{k}\) 		Covariates that lower the p-value of \(X\) are retained in the final model
Separate covariate linear model without X \(Y \sim C_{1}\)
\(Y \sim C_{2}\)
\(\vdots\)
\(Y \sim C_{k}\) 		Significant covariates (\(p < .05\)) are retained in the final model
Separate covariate linear model with X \(Y \sim X + C_{1}\)
\(Y \sim X + C_{2}\)
\(\vdots\)
\(Y \sim X + C_{k}\) 		Significant covariates (\(p < .05\)) when controlling for \(X\) are retained in the final model
Simultaneous covariate linear model without X \(Y \sim C_{1} + C_{2} + \cdots + C_{k}\) Significant covariates (\(p < .05\)) when controlling for all other covariates are retained in the final model
Simultaneous covariate linear model with X \(Y \sim X + C_{1} + C_{2} + \cdots + C_{k}\) Significant covariates (\(p < .05\)) when controlling for \(X\) and all other covariates are retained in the final model
Simultaneous covariate LASSO without X \(Y \sim C_{1} + C_{2} + \cdots + C_{k}\) with \(\lambda\) penalty applied to all covariates Covariates with non-zero coefficients are retained in the model
Simultaneous covariate LASSO with X \(Y \sim X + C_{1} + C_{2} + \cdots + C_{k}\) with \(\lambda\) penalty applied to all covariates Covariates with non-zero coefficients are retained in the model
Note:
Screening models represent symbolic linear models where \(Y\) is the outcome, \(X\) is the focal independent variable, \(C\) is a covariate, and \(k\) is the number of covariates.
````` ::: ::: ::: {#tbl-dictionary .cell tbl-cap='Research context variables and values'} ```{.r .cell-code .hidden} #| label: tbl-dictionary #| tbl-cap: "Research context variables and values" data_tbl0 <- tibble( description = c( "The population parameter for the focal IV", "The sample size", "The number of covariates available", "The percentage of covariates with non-zero correlations with the outcome", "The magnitude of the correlation between the covariates and Y"), values = c("0, 0.2, 0.5", "50, 100, 150, 200, 300, 400", "4, 8, 12, 16, 20", "0.25, 0.50, 0.75", "0.3, 0.5" ) ) data_tbl0 |> kbl(col.names = c("Research Context Variable", "Values"), escape = FALSE, format = "html") |> kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped"), full_width = FALSE) |> column_spec(1, width = "15em") |> column_spec(2, width = "10em") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden} ``` Warning in attr(x, "align"): 'xfun::attr()' is deprecated. Use 'xfun::attr2()' instead. See help("Deprecated") ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Research Context Variable Values
The population parameter for the focal IV 0, 0.2, 0.5
The sample size 50, 100, 150, 200, 300, 400
The number of covariates available 4, 8, 12, 16, 20
The percentage of covariates with non-zero correlations with the outcome 0.25, 0.50, 0.75
The magnitude of the correlation between the covariates and Y 0.3, 0.5
````` ::: ::: ::: {#tbl-est .cell tbl-cap='Mean estimates of effect size by method and true effect size'} ```{.r .cell-code .hidden} #| label: tbl-est #| tbl-cap: "Mean estimates of effect size by method and true effect size" #| warning: false table |> rename(Method = method, `No effect ($\\beta_{x}=0$)` = `0`, `$\\beta_{x}=0.2$` = `0.2`, `$\\beta_{x}=0.5$` = `0.5`) |> mutate( Method = factor( Method, levels = c("no_covs", "all_covs", "p_hacked", "r", "partial_r", "full_lm_wo_x", "full_lm", "lasso_wo_x", "lasso"), labels = c("No covariates", "All covariates", "p-hacking", "Separate covariate lm without X", "Separate covariate lm with X", "Simultaneous covariate lm without X", "Simultaneous covariate lm with X", "Simultaneous covariate LASSO without X", "Simultaneous covariate LASSO with X") ) ) |> mutate(across(-Method, ~sprintf("%.3f", abs(.)))) |> arrange(Method) |> add_row(Method = "A priori selection", .before = 1) |> add_row(Method = "Data-driven selection", .after = 3) |> kable(escape = FALSE) |> kable_classic() |> pack_rows(NULL, 2, 3) |> pack_rows(NULL, 5, 11) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden} ``` Warning in attr(x, "align"): 'xfun::attr()' is deprecated. Use 'xfun::attr2()' instead. See help("Deprecated") Warning in attr(x, "align"): 'xfun::attr()' is deprecated. Use 'xfun::attr2()' instead.
